steps.name: TTS preview via adapter (BR-5)
steps.commit_sha: already present in tts_preview_service.py on main pre-session

steps.name: Wire up tests + verify all Acceptance Criteria
steps.last_error: Unit tests for ProjectService cover BR-1/2/3/4/6 (15 tests, all green). Integration tests (test_projects_crud.py, test_projects_permissions.py) and Playwright e2e were NOT written this session — no live Postgres/browser available in this sandbox to exercise them meaningfully, and existing test infra mocks DB at the session level per-module (conftest.py) rather than via a generic fixture reusable for Project. Deferred; flagged in memory/project-memory.md Open Questions.

decisions: 2026-07-17 reconciliation note in this file was stale: commits 68b24e4/cba4fb3 referenced there don't exist in git history anywhere (verified via `git cat-file -t` — not found). Re-audited from scratch this session.

Found and fixed 3 real bugs blocking Project entirely: (1) app/models/project.py had a de-indented `status_history` relationship line causing IndentationError on import; (2) app/models/step_version.py used DateTime without importing it; (3) app/models/status_history.py used relationship() without importing it. All three meant Project/StepVersion/StatusHistory could never be imported before this session — projects.py (already written on main) could never have been wired into main.py because it would have crashed at import time.

app/api/projects.py (pre-existing on main) referenced app.schemas.project (didn't exist) and ProjectService.get_any/unarchive/clone_step_versions (didn't exist) — created schemas/project.py and added the 3 missing service methods to make the router's existing code actually work as written, rather than rewriting the router.

Fixed a circular import: app/services/state_machine.py imported app.events.bus at module level, but app/events/__init__.py imports EDGES back from state_machine — deferred the events import into _emit() (lazy, only where used).

Fixed a missing FK: StepVersion.project_id and StatusHistory.project_id had no ForeignKey('projects.id'), causing NoForeignKeysError on first Project() instantiation once the model finally imported cleanly. Added ForeignKey(ondelete='CASCADE') to both.

Added app/models/__init__.py imports of every model class — SQLAlchemy's relationship() string-resolution (e.g. Project.status_history -> "StatusHistory") depends on the class having been imported somewhere before mapper configuration runs; previously only whichever module happened to import first would work.

Consolidated NEXT_ACTION_MAP/LIFECYCLE_GROUPS into schemas/project.py as the single source (project_service.py and api/projects.py both import from there) instead of the pre-existing 2x duplication across service+router.

Integration/e2e tests (Step 7 back half) deferred — no live Postgres or browser in this environment; unit tests cover the business-rule ACs (1,2,3,6) directly. Flagged as an Open Question for whichever agent has a full env to close it out.
